title: I let Claude Code take my job (it did better than me)
summary: Alberta Tech ran an experiment where Claude Code (Anthropic's AI coding assistant) completed a programming job task, with the AI performing better than the human creator. The video explores the workflow, results, and implications of AI displacement in coding work through a hands-on comparison.
